chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-498 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.5793/2017 2. For orders on CMA No.5794/2017 3. For hearing of CMA No.4576/2017 4. For hearing of CMA No.3442/2017 5. For hearing of main case 14-09-2023 Mr. Muhammad Imran Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for Applicant/Intervener Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It appears that none has been appearing for the petitioner for long, the last time petitioner’s counsel was present in the Court on 03.12.2019. Today also no intimation is received and petitioner and his counsel are absent. We have tentatively seen the reliefs, sought by the petitioner through this petition which appear to be incompetent as far as the jurisdiction of this court is concerned as the disputed questions of facts are involved. The subject property has also been claimed by the Trust which is further evident from the report of Mukhtiarkar Sukkur dated 11.03.2020. But, yet since no one is present on behalf of the petitioner, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
